lead_profile_text: NHS physiotherapist building private clinic. Moving in with partner nearby. Friend currently lodging — leaving in ~6 months. Switching from lodger arrangement to STL. Mortgage remortgage due September 2026 — weighing holiday let / BTL company / clear £25k balance.
emotional_profile: Measured and financially analytical. Lifestyle-income focused — wants passive income to fund private practice transition. Not a portfolio builder. Values simplicity, flexibility, low involvement.
delay_trigger_phrases: friend currently lodging, moving out in ~6 months
I'll need to speak to my mortgage broker about this
green_light_trigger_phrases: consistent passive income with minimal hassle
I want the flexibility to reduce my hospital days

top_objections.text: Getting the right type of guests — specifically wants NHS and healthcare workers
top_objections.zac_response: Countess of Chester Hospital proximity drives NHS guest demand; ID checks and deposit screen out problem guests

top_objections.text: Guest damage and theft rated as biggest worry
Mortgage structure complexity — holiday let vs BTL company vs clear £25k balance
top_objections.zac_response: Recommend speaking to mortgage broker; Stayful operates under all structures

top_objections.text: Council tax premium during transition period
top_objections.zac_response: Initially premium rate, transitions to zero business rates after ~1 year

top_objections.text: Away mid-June to end of July — not a decision period
top_objections.zac_response: Follow-up call early August aligns with return

top_questions.text: What type of guests will the property attract?
top_questions.answer: NHS/healthcare workers from Countess of Chester Hospital; racecourse and event visitors; university guests
Initially premium rate; transitions to zero business rates after approximately 1 year
Holiday let mortgage, BTL with company structure, or clear £25k balance — mortgage broker consultation recommended

what_moved_them: Chester demand consistency — one of most consistent income projections in England
Countess of Chester Hospital as NHS guest demand driver
Quarterly performance calls and monthly statements structure
Passive income framing connecting to reducing hospital days
what_fell_flat: No special offer — no urgency lever available
Mortgage complexity not resolved in meeting

conversion_gaps.gap: Mortgage structure decision is the real gate before signing
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Encourage broker conversation in July; reconnect in August with clarity on structure

conversion_gaps.gap: No urgency — slow engagement pace until August
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Chester Christmas markets angle — November live date hits peak December season; frame September mortgage decision as the unlock

offer_framing: No offer made — standard 15% + VAT discussed
zac_close_phrase: Let's speak early August — by then your friend will be closer to moving and your mortgage will be clearer
zac_income_intro: £1,700/month average (£1,200-£2,000 range) — one of the most consistent income projections in England. Chester hits its peak in December for Christmas markets.
zac_transition_phrases: The demand in Chester is genuinely year-round — hospital workers, racecourse, 400+ events
The passive income funds your private clinic transition — it's the simplest version of that plan
zac_reassurance_phrases: Minimal hassle — Stayful handles everything, you get a monthly statement and a bank transfer
Council tax sorts itself out within the first year to zero rates
